steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The phrase “made themselves very manifest” describes drawbacks that become noticeable over the years. We need a word meaning something is visible, apparent, or clear.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Evident” means “obviously visible” or “clear”—so drawbacks that “made themselves very evident” = drawbacks that became obvious to Katharine over time. The other three options—particular (specific), involved (complex), and expected (anticipated)—don't capture this sense of something becoming apparent. This matches choice D — D is correct.
